goal: Implement the native AG-UI-compatible AI chat as the primary UI client while reusing the shared backend protocol foundation.
global_constraints: Do not update AG-UI or CopilotKit versions without owner approval.
Native UI must remain AG-UI-compatible and must ignore unknown events safely.
Django remains the owner of sessions, auth, history and audit.
Browser UI commands must only perform safe UI actions and never domain writes.
Do not expose gateway tokens, cookies, raw PII, UNC paths or full DOM in browser state.
Keep CopilotKit and legacy drivers available.
Native parity work must reuse existing Django session, message, attachment, command and audit models instead of creating parallel storage.
acceptance: Native sidebar mounts from /ai/ui/config/ and not CopilotKit config.
New chat updates thread_id and signed forwarded_props.
TEXT_MESSAGE events stream into a single assistant message.
TOOL_CALL events render a compact tool trace.
STATE_DELTA and local_business.ui_command execute allow-listed UI commands once.
RUN_ERROR and transport errors unlock the form and show a user-safe message.
E2E covers the main native AG-UI scenario.
Native sidebar restores recent history on page load.
Native sidebar supports model selection, clear with confirmation, timestamps and full chat entrypoint.
Native full-page experience supports session list, title edit, delete, Markdown rendering, slash commands and attachments or records any deferred gap explicitly.
Native UX parity has dedicated unit and Playwright e2e coverage.
verification_commands: E2E_AI_UI_DRIVER=native npm run test:e2e -- --project=chromium --grep "native chat UX parity"
